dialogueLines.dialogueText: Hey, are you the bartender that is taking on those bosses there?
Good, good. Those guys were a thorn in my side for too long.
I had gig riding around delivering meals in my food cart,
I was engaged in whimsical, Rated-E-for-everyone hijinks, and now I have nothing.
My name? Well, it’s ‘Grub Bug (2025)’ of course. And yes, ‘(2025)’ is my last name
It’s a common last name for the country I’m from, called Itch.Io
You should visit it if you beat all those bosses! Especially the dgacornell.itch.io province!
Hey friend! Nice job defeating that guy who was riding around with his pigs.
Actually, the way he was riding around was nostalgic to me.
You see, it reminded me of how I used to ride around in my food cart back at home…
I rode around the open-sandbox city, delivering food while evading cops.
Oh, how fun those adventures I, ‘Grub Bug (2025)’ had back in the land of ‘Itch.Io.’
You should visit that site sometime. It might be a nice vacation after completing this adventure.
Dang, you really showed that drill guy who’s boss!
But, it’s funny, the way he was riding in that cart, reminds me of how I rode in my food cart.
Yep, back in my home country of Itch.io, I was delivering food to hungry customers.
In a high-octane, very fun adventure, that I’d recommend to anyone…
...AFTER, of course, finishing this ‘game’!
Hey friend! That battle was awesome! You really showed those magicians.
That girl there disappearing and reappearing constantly was a little familiar, though…
Oh yeah! It reminded me of how I needed to disappear from the cops a lot.
Yep! It was fun though, almost like it was a ‘game’ made by some really talented people.
And that ‘gameplay’ loop of needing to deliver food while escaping them? What a thrill!
You should try it out with me, ‘Grub Bug (2025)’, at my home country of ‘Itch.Io’!
Only when you’re done with this current ‘game’ of yours!
I see that the final battle is upon you. I, ‘Grub Bug (2025)’, wish you luck.
I know that you feel ‘Completely Hammered (2024)’ from your countless battles.
Their villany must enrage you with the ‘Fury of the Lost Knight (2023)’.
I know victory may seem as unlikely as you making a ‘Scute Shoot (2025)’ in the dark.
But you must persist! Because, only you can, ‘Duke, vs the Gang (2026)’ and win!
...Uhh…. something something segue ‘TILLY’S CRITTER COMMAND (2025)’!!!!
Congratulations, Duke! You really did verse the Gang!
Now that you’re free, I, ‘Grub Bug (2025),’ can finally get your undivided attention.
And how many more adventures like this one can be found on Itch.io!
In particular, I can tell you about the wonders of my home province of ‘dgacorne-’
.... What?
… ‘Paid sponsor?’..... ‘Shameless Plug’... Those words are foreign to an Itch.ioian like myself.
Maybe you should be more sensitive and open-minded, Duke my friend.
